textByHashes.6595a65f3782a1e98788f464763a73867b72a2c9: Ah, hello! Isn't it a wonderful day?
textByHashes.74b4c4aeed2ab6952d4ea31b9cc8272fa2413f62: And why wouldn't I be? I'm part of the best fighting force in the world! The Shayzien Army!
textByHashes.54f75f89cb957944d59b07ef3dd234734a602b66: Well... I suppose we don't really have any magical capabilities. That's more an Arceuus thing. Though of course, they're mostly pacifists. Apparently they didn't even properly fight in the War of the Five Houses.
textByHashes.26c8c759c256ce9ec7f7d3ed5790fa48fd7a1512: Still, I guess 'War of the Four Houses while House Arceuus watched' isn't as catchy a name.
textByHashes.8f80524105fadccc552af8e7be4c3dbdcc6c4de5: Well... we are just an army. We don't have a navy, so can't really deal with any threats at sea. Lady Piscarilius is meant to be in charge of the Kourend Navy. Problem is, it doesn't actually exist.
textByHashes.e69e69a3685fe40cfa20695af5a3489f45ae2795: Lady Piscarilius has little interest in that sort of thing. Lord Shayzien wants to establish a Shayzien Navy instead, but there's a lot of pushback from the rest of the kingdom.
textByHashes.da0835b518e211c2172708e20259ffd2fda6bdc4: They worry about Shayzien having too much power. It does mean we'll have big problems against any enemy navy, but on their heads be it I suppose.
textByHashes.f8f92233bb9a24ff3dea37d1d2f64379a18715ce: Anyway, apart from those minor issues, the Shayzien Army has absolutely no weaknesses!
